overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a robed character exploring a dimly lit gothic castle interior. The character walks through a grand hall with stone columns and tapestries, ascends a spiral staircase, traverses a narrow corridor, and enters a small chamber containing a mystical green flame.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with tapestries and stone columns

events.description: approaching the spiral staircase at the end of the hall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the grand hall towards the spiral staircase

entered.detail: large decorative wall hanging depicting figures or scenes
tall gothic stone pillar supporting the ceiling
dark wooden writing desk with items on top
tall standing lamp with warm yellow light
upholstered bench seating with curved wooden frame

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a spacious gothic hall with polished stone floors. A large tapestry hangs on the far wall between stone columns, while ornate furniture including a sofa and wooden desk furnish the space. Warm lamplight illuminates the scene as the character approaches a spiral staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral stone staircase with wall tapestries

events.description: reaches the top of the staircase and enters narrow corridor

agents.ego_description: climbing the curved stone staircase, following the spiral path upward along the wall

entered.detail: winding stone staircase with worn steps curving upward
smooth curved stone handrail following the staircase
vertical wall hanging decorating the stairwell wall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow spiral staircase with stone steps and a curved banister. Wall tapestries and sconces line the left side as the camera follows the tight curve upward. The hall furniture disappears from view below as the character climbs toward the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor with arched ceiling

events.description: enters narrow corridor at the top of the spiral stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up the narrow corridor with stone walls and arched ceilings

entered.detail: confined stone passage with steps continuing upward
curved stone ceiling with ribbed vaulting

segments.scene_description: Continuing upward through a tight stone corridor with arched ceilings, the character moves away from the spiral staircase. The passage is dimly lit by wall sconces, with rough stone walls on both sides. The corridor leads toward a visible doorway at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: small chamber with mystical green flame and treasure chest

events.description: enters chamber containing a glowing green flame and treasure chest

agents.ego_description: entering the small chamber and approaching the chest near the magical green flame

entered.detail: magical emerald fire burning in a brazier or bowl
ornate wooden chest with metal fittings
heavy wooden door with metal studs

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small chamber featuring a mystical green flame burning brightly on the left. A treasure chest sits in the center of the room, and ornate furniture is arranged against the walls. The green magical light mixes with the warm artificial lighting as the character approaches the chest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a spacious, warmly lit gothic hall into a secluded chamber illuminated by a mystical glow. It begins with the character traversing a grand room of polished stone and ornate furniture, moving past large tapestries and columns toward a spiral staircase. As the character ascends the narrow stone steps, the open hall disappears below and the space tightens, following the curve of the banister upward. The scene then shifts into a dimly lit stone corridor with arched ceilings and flickering sconces before finally opening into a small chamber. Here, the warm artificial light blends with the vivid radiance of a mystical green flame as the character approaches a central treasure chest.
